---
title: "Community of St Michael and All Angels, Bloemfontein"
---

## Community of St Michael and All Angels, Bloemfontein

**Type:** organization

### About

This was a nursing sisterhood founded in 1874. It still (2010) exists.
http://communities.anglicancommunion.org/communities/detail.cfm?ID=28&types=byname

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
